title: 690 Pieces 304 Stainless Steel Flat Washers for Screws Bolts, Fender Washers Assortment Set, Assorted Hardware Lock Metal Washers Kit (9Sizes-M2 M2.5 M3 M4 M5 M6 M8 M10 M12) for Home, Factories
features: 【Sizes】M2（120 Pcs) M2.5（120 Pcs) M3（120 Pcs) M4（120 Pcs) M5 （80Pcs) M6（50 Pcs)M8（ 50Pcs)M10（ 20Pcs) M12（ 10Pcs), total 690 pieces/9 sizes of the most commonly used stainless steel washers, flat washers, metal washers in a plastic case, different size can satisfy your different needs.

【Top 304 Stainless Steel】304 Stainless Steel, stainless steel material which have good corrosion resistance in bad environment like high temperature, cold weather, and high humidity areas. Which can ensure long time using even in bad environment like high temperature, cold weather, and high humidity areas.

【Wide Applications】Highly compatible with screws, nuts and bolts of same sizes and feature solid bearing surface to prevent nut/bolt head from tearing through material. Designed to spread the load of a screwed fastening and prevent loosening in industrial, shop, decks and fence building, automotive and furniture repair.

【Design】Flat washers, metric washers, metal washers are designed for electrical connections on household and commercial appliances, automotive and marine uses in which the power source has a threaded/bolt-type connection.

【Easy Storage】All stainless steel flat washers for screws bolts are packed in a sturdy Transparent Plastic case, Clear and Easy to Use Storage Box Use 9 grids to distinguish 9 sizes, with specification label, for your use simple and clear every time.
